data.four_set_effect: Incoming elemental DMG increases corresponding Elemental RES by 30% for 10s. Can only occur once every 10s.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A cheap accessory that is actually made from ancient meteoric ore.
circlet_of_logos.title: Tiny Miracle's Earrings

flower_of_life.desc: A flower that grew from a rock, breaking through the stone as it strove to reach the light.
flower_of_life.title: Tiny Miracle's Flower

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A cup commonly used for fortune-telling. It can also hold water, of course.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Tiny Miracle's Goblet

plume_of_death.desc: A feather from a bird of prey that flies almost too fast for the human eye to detect.
plume_of_death.title: Tiny Miracle's Feather

sands_of_eon.desc: Just an ordinary, everyday hourglass. Turn it upside down and sure enough, the dry sand starts trickling down like water.
sands_of_eon.title: Tiny Miracle's Hourglass

list.desc: A little blue flower that sprouted between the cracks of an old tombstone.</br>The carvings on the tombstone are a legacy of death, yet what sprouted from its cracks was the miracle of life.</br>
list.title: Tiny Miracle's Flower

list.desc: An inexpensive pair of earrings made from metal that shines like the stars.</br>What the sellers don't know is that the shine of these earrings comes from the fallen stars of ancient times.</br>
list.title: Tiny Miracle's Earrings

list.desc: A clear goblet glittering with starlight.</br>In the past it was used to tell fortunes,</br>For the water it held was believed to reflect the Starry Sea.</br>
list.title: Tiny Miracle's Goblet

list.desc: Plucked from a falcon that was as fast as the wind. The mere existence of such a bird is a miracle.</br>It was gifted with clear vision and sharp claws.</br>With its broad wings, its gliding speed was unparalleled.</br>
list.title: Tiny Miracle's Feather

list.desc: It is often said that one may achieve victory by striving, but receive a miracle only by waiting.</br>But is it not a miracle that fine sand was once a hard rock?</br>Is it not too a miracle that we met each other?</br>
list.title: Tiny Miracle's Hourglass
